chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No. 158 to 163 of 2014 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing Case (Priority) 1. For order on office objection and reply at A 2. For hearing of Main Case 3. For hearing of CMA No. 881/2014 18.02.2026 Ms. Masooda Siraj Advocate for the Applicant These matters are pending since 2014 without any progress. Diary demonstrates that on numerous occasions time was sought to prepare the case including as recorded vide Orders dated 31.08.2016, 25.01.2021, 22.02.2021 and 23.04.2021. Even today upon so confronted, learned counsel merely seeks more time. Respectfully, these matters have clogged the docket for almost 12 years and learned counsel even now remains unable to assist and seeks time. It appears that the applicants are not interested in proceeding with these matters. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in each connected matter. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad PS
